A '''stathas''' was a sleek, [[Poison/Legends|venomous]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptile]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Mandalore system/Legends|Mandalore system]],<ref name="Polyhedron" /> located in the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The stathas was known to use its seemingly harmless appearance to hide its [[Death/Legends|deadly]] capabilities.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

==Behind the scenes==
The stathas first appeared in the [[Polyhedron 100|one-hundredth issue]] of the [[Roleplaying game|roleplay]] magazine ''[[Polyhedron]]'', published in [[October]] of [[1994]]. As with most of the content from ''Polyhedron'' published before [[2002]], the stathas' place in the continuity of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Legends|expanded universe]] is currently ambiguous.
